ssh_alias.description: Optional user-provided SSH config alias. The plugin never stores private keys.

ssh_command.description: Optional explicit local command. Runtime allows only simple ssh/ssh.exe forms without ProxyCommand or arbitrary options.

ssh_batch_mode.description: Optional SSH BatchMode toggle. Defaults to true so agent tools never wait for interactive password prompts.

ssh_connect_timeout.description: Optional SSH ConnectTimeout in seconds. Defaults to 15 for agent-safe failure instead of hanging.

scheduler.description: Optional remote scheduler. Use slurm when heavy jobs should be queued with sbatch/squeue instead of watched from an interactive shell.

scheduler_time.description: Optional Slurm --time value for generated heavy-job submissions.

scheduler_gpu_gres.description: Optional Slurm GPU request such as gpu:1 for GPU-bound methods. CPU-only MD smoke jobs do not use it.

scheduler_max_queue_wait_minutes.description: Projected Slurm waits beyond this many minutes are recorded as an advisory. The generated workflow submits one job and leaves it queued rather than creating a duplicate submission.

gnina.description: Explicit GNINA wrapper/binary path supplied by the user or local profile.

smina.description: Explicit SMINA binary path supplied by the user or local profile.

obabel.description: Explicit Open Babel binary/wrapper path supplied by the user or local profile.

gromacs.description: Explicit GROMACS gmx binary path supplied by the user or local profile.

gmx.description: Alias for explicit GROMACS gmx binary path.

gromacs_ld_library_path.description: Optional LD_LIBRARY_PATH needed by the GROMACS runtime, for example PLUMED libraries.

ld_library_path.description: Optional LD_LIBRARY_PATH needed by remote runtime commands.

mdtools_env.description: Optional MD tools environment root used for ligand parameterization helpers.

acpype.description: Optional ACPYPE executable for ligand topology generation.

antechamber.description: Optional AmberTools antechamber executable for ligand charge/parameter preparation.

ssh_control_master.description: Optional escape hatch for SSH multiplexing. Defaults to enabled. Set false/0/no to disable ControlMaster for this profile.

ssh_control_persist.description: Optional OpenSSH ControlPersist value. Defaults to 10m.

ssh_control_path.description: Optional explicit OpenSSH ControlPath. Defaults to a short hash path under the local temp directory.

ssh_session_persist.description: Optional OpenSSH ControlPersist value used by `session open`. Defaults to 8h.
